name: Clothes E-Commerce Website
summary: Responsive React + Redux Toolkit storefront with REST integration and cross-browser polish.
description: Built a responsive SPA with React.js and Redux Toolkit, improving load time by 35%. Implemented REST API integration and cross-browser compatibility for seamless UX across devices.
highlights: 35% faster load via code splitting and asset tuning
Clean Redux Toolkit slices for cart, catalog, and auth

name: Amazon E-Commerce Platform
summary: Full-stack e-commerce solution with Angular + React + Next.js storefront and a Nest.js + MongoDB backend.
description: Developed a full-stack e-commerce solution using Angular, React.js, Next.js, Nest.js, MongoDB, and Material UI. Achieved 30% faster API performance through optimized data fetching and Redux Toolkit state management.
highlights: Full-stack ownership across Angular, React, and Next.js surfaces
30% API performance lift via optimized fetching
Redux Toolkit state architecture across multi-app frontend

name: Movie Discovery Web App
summary: Searchable movie UI hitting 98% mobile responsiveness with pure HTML/CSS/JS.
description: Created a searchable UI using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript, achieving 98% mobile responsiveness via media queries and flex grid layouts. Zero framework, framework-free architecture.
highlights: Pure HTML / CSS / JavaScript — no framework

name: Ehsbha — Driver Analytics SaaS
summary: Production-grade SaaS dashboard for ride-share and delivery drivers across MENA — trips, expenses, maintenance, analytics, all offline-capable as a PWA.
description: Smart operating system for ride-share / delivery / transportation drivers in Egypt and MENA. Web-only PWA on React 19 + Vite 6 with a NestJS 11 + Prisma 6 + PostgreSQL backend. 20 routes covering KPI dashboard, trip & expense CRUD, vehicle-health and true cost per km, driver score with 14-day history, smart decision recommendations, profit simulator, and bilingual Arabic/English RTL UI with dark/light themes. Money stored as integer piastres, distance in integer meters, idempotent writes via clientMutationId UUIDs, pre-computed daily/weekly/monthly aggregates for O(1) reads. JWT (HS256) auth with rotating refresh tokens and reuse detection, Argon2id password hashing, nightly cron aggregates.
highlights: Bilingual Arabic/English with full RTL + dark/light themes
Offline-first PWA (~1.2MB Workbox precache) with service-worker fallback
Money as integer piastres (EGP × 100) and distance as integer meters — zero float drift
Idempotent mutations via clientMutationId UUIDs; pre-computed aggregates for O(1) reads
33/33 backend smoke tests + 36/36 engine unit tests passing
